parameters.name: config
parameters.description: Configures the CSS anchor name shared by the anchor and target.

properties.name: anchorName
properties.description: A custom CSS anchor name shared by the anchor and target.

properties.name: getAnchorProps
properties.description: Returns the props that establish an element as the anchor.

properties.name: getTargetProps
properties.description: Returns the props that position an element relative to the anchor.

properties.name: placement
properties.description: The target's logical placement relative to the anchor.

properties.name: alignment
properties.description: The target's alignment along the placement axis.

properties.name: fallbackStrategy
properties.description: Controls which overflow fallbacks the browser may try.

properties.name: gap
properties.description: The space between the anchor and target.
